name: Disabling Products
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can manage product lifecycle and prevent unwanted sales through product disabling in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", which removes products from active selling while preserving historical transaction data and product records. This product status management capability helps retail operators handle discontinued items, seasonal products, or obsolete inventory, with proper product disabling typically improving catalog clarity and preventing accidental sales of unavailable items across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product disabling functionality in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to systematically remove products from POS visibility and purchasing workflows while maintaining complete historical records for reporting and analysis. This product management capability helps ensure your retail operations can maintain clean active catalogs while preserving data integrity and supporting accurate historical reporting on discontinued products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products can be disabled in Retail Express, however for historical and auditing purposes, they cannot be deleted. When a product is disabled it has the following effect:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Hides the product from "}, {"text": "reports", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Stocktake", "bold": true}, {"text": " by default (unless explicitly selected to include Disabled Products)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Turns off communication between Retail Express and eCommerce/Web Store "}, {"text": "integrations", "bold": true}, {"text": " (depending on the integration the product may not be removed from the online web store"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Excluded from Product Search in POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Disabled Products can still be sold in POS via scanning or manually entering the Product ID/Supplier SKU as it's assumed you are intentionally entering the product to be sold e.g. if you physically have it in your hand."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are 3 ways to disable products within
